title: Allow processing of network options from FlagSet
body:
In situations where you don't want/need Cobra climbing behavior nor
Cobra at all using FlagSet is the easier sell.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Bergmeier <abergmeier@gmx.net>

comments.body:
LGTM assuming happy tests.
I'm not sure, but this might need a rebase to make GitHub happy
@abergmeier LGTM. Just curious. Are you using buildah as a library ?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *abergmeier*, *flouthoc*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [flouthoc,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Are you using buildah as a library ?

Yeah I currently use a fork of buildah as a library. Hopefully at some point I can use upstream.
